summary: Iteration 27: Frontend-only testing of Home Assistant-style sidebar navigation. All 8 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Sidebar navigation - clicking on nav items (Discovery, Sizing, Tokens, SmartFill, History) switches main content correctly
Customer list in sidebar - shows all customers under CUSTOMERS section with initials, clicking switches to that customer
IP Calculator visibility - shows formula 'KW × Mult = IPs' clearly in sidebar (e.g., '5000 × 2.5 = 125K')
Sidebar collapse/expand - collapse button reduces sidebar from 224px to 64px (icons-only mode)
Target Solutions in sidebar - collapsible section with UDDI, Security, Asset toggle buttons
Save/Export buttons in sidebar footer - both visible and enabled
Dashboard link returns to customer list - clicking Dashboard nav item navigates back to Customers page
New Customer option in customer list - button present in sidebar under CUSTOMERS section
critical_code_review_comments: AppSidebar.jsx: Home Assistant-style sidebar with nav items using data-testid='nav-{id}' for Discovery, Sizing, Tokens, SmartFill, History
AppSidebar.jsx: IP Calculator (lines 262-320) shows formula with KW input, multiplier input, and calculated result
AppSidebar.jsx: Sidebar collapse (lines 166-173) toggles between w-56 (224px) and w-16 (64px) with transition-all duration-300
AppSidebar.jsx: Target Solutions collapsible section (lines 324-343) with UDDI, Security, Asset toggle buttons
AppSidebar.jsx: Save/Export buttons in footer (lines 399-435) with proper tooltips in collapsed mode
CustomerDetail.jsx: Uses state-based activeTab (line 631) instead of Tabs component for content switching
CustomerDetail.jsx: Tab content rendered conditionally based on activeTab state (lines 704-746)
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Test Customer Frontend' customer with 4 DCs and 1 Site
context_for_next_testing_agent: Home Assistant-style sidebar navigation fully implemented and tested. Sidebar has: (1) Navigation items with data-testid='nav-discovery/sizing/tokens/smartfill/history', (2) Customer list under CUSTOMERS section with New Customer option, (3) IP Calculator showing 'KW × Mult = IPs' formula, (4) Collapse/expand button (224px -> 64px), (5) Target Solutions collapsible with UDDI/Security/Asset toggles, (6) Save/Export buttons in footer, (7) Dashboard link to return to customer list. All features working correctly.

ip_calculator.output: Calculated IPs in primary color badge

target_solutions.toggle_style: Pill buttons with green active state

new_customer.action: Returns to dashboard for new customer creation
